<<NAME>>
<<EMAIL>>  |  <<PHONE>>

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Keep buildings in clean and orderly condition. Perform heavy cleaning duties, such as cleaning floors, shampooing rugs, washing walls and glass, and removing rubbish.

EDUCATION
A.A., General Studies -- Thomas State University (1999)

EXPERIENCE
Senior Janitors and Cleaners, Except Maids and Housekeeping Cleaner -- Baker-Morrison (2012-2024)
- Clean chimneys, flues, and connecting pipes, using power or hand tools.
- Clean and restore building interiors damaged by fire, smoke, or water, using commercial cleaning equipment.
- Remove snow from sidewalks, driveways, or parking areas, using snowplows, snow blowers, or snow shovels, or spread snow-melting chemicals.
- Follow procedures for the use of chemical cleaners and power equipment to prevent damage to floors and fixtures.
- Drive vans, industrial trucks, or other vehicles required to travel to, or to perform, cleaning work.

Janitors and Cleaners, Except Maids and Housekeeping Cleaners -- Crawford Ltd (1999-2012)
- Make adjustments or minor repairs to heating, cooling, ventilating, plumbing, or electrical systems.
- Gather and empty trash.
- Spray insecticides or fumigants to prevent insect or rodent infestation.
- Steam-clean or shampoo carpets.
- Mix water and detergents or acids in containers to prepare cleaning solutions, according to specifications.

SKILLS
Speaking, Active Listening, Time Management, Critical Thinking, Monitoring, Coordination, Active Learning, Social Perceptiveness
